news.headline: Deadly attack by teen gunmen on a San Diego mosque
news.summary: Police raced Monday to catch an armed teenage runaway before he and another teen opened fire on a San Diego mosque, killing three men and then themselves. The shooting is being investigated as a hate crime, San Diego Police Chief Scott Wahl said.

news.headline: Musk vs Altman: What to know about the OpenAI verdict
news.summary: Elon Musk’s planned appeal suggests the legal battle is far from over.

news.headline: Selling children to survive: Afghan fathers forced to make impossible choices
news.summary: In Afghanistan today, a staggering three in four people cannot meet their basic needs.
